description: MANDATE-07 #7b / MANDATE-15 'real incident' case: inject paymentFailure=100% on checkout via flagd. Detector must fire on grpc-error-rate-high or error-budget-burn-fast-checkout (either counts as 'caught' for this event) within one detection cycle. duration_seconds/settle_seconds are a starting point tuned for a low-to-moderate-traffic demo stack — both queries use a trailing rate(...[5m]) window, so if live traffic volume is much higher/lower than expected, extend duration_seconds until the fault clearly dominates the 5m window before re-scoring.
